title: Trend Report
description: A trend report fed into a trend-reserved calendar slot (spec §6.7). Defined in v1 even though automated trend polling is roadmap: manual submission through this schema is the supported v1 trend input. Always Zone U. Topics carry suggested angles but NO drafted comment text — authentic engagement is suggested as angles, never drafted. The freshness_window feeds the trend-card TTL (DD-15).

period.description: The reporting period this report covers (the window the trends were observed in).

platform.description: Platform descriptor id the trends were observed on.

topics.description: The trending topics. Each topic supplies suggested angles only; no drafted comment text is permitted.

source_links.description: Source links backing the trend observation.

suggested_angles.description: Angles the brand could take on the topic. Angles only — never drafted comment/reply text.

freshness_window.description: How long the trend stays actionable. Inherited by trend-derived content as expires-basis and drives the trend-card TTL (DD-15).

duration.description: Duration the trend remains fresh, as an ISO 8601 duration (e.g. PT12H, P2D).

expires_at.description: Absolute time the trend window closes.

provenance.description: How this report was produced. Always Zone U (untrusted external input), whether manually submitted or adapter-fetched.

trust_zone.description: Trust zone. Always U for trend reports.

submitted_by.description: Optional identifier of the operator who submitted a manual report.
